title: AuthorizeOfflinePassResponse
description: Server response to an AuthorizeOfflinePassRequest, granting or denying the offline pass authorization.

status.description: Result of the offline pass authorization.

sessionId.description: Assigned session identifier. Present when status is Accepted.

durationSeconds.description: Authorized service duration in seconds. Present when status is Accepted.

creditsAuthorized.description: Number of credits authorized for this session. Present when status is Accepted.

reason.description: Human-readable rejection reason. Present when status is Rejected.
